measurement_note: Size is N, the node count. Each legal graph has a type-3 chain that connects both users followed by distinct type-3 chords from node 1, so exactly N-2 chords are removable. The remotely Accepted path-compressed, ranked DSU and an independent optimized DSU use O(E alpha(N)) time. A correct uncompressed DSU deliberately forms a deep parent chain and performs O(NE) work on the chords, completes all 32/128/512 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: shared chain and chords at n=32
benchmark: shared chain and chords at n=128
benchmark: shared chain and chords at n=512
